_comment: M&M 3e core power effects — from the d20 Hero SRD (OGL). These are the 40 base effects; sample powers (Blast, Strike, etc.) are built from these with modifiers.

affliction.name: Affliction
affliction.recovery: End of each turn for 1st/2nd degree; 1 minute or Treatment/Healing DC 10+rank for 3rd degree
affliction.note: Choose one condition per degree at creation. Resistance is Fortitude or Will (chosen at creation).

burrowing.name: Burrowing
burrowing.note: Tunnel through ground at rank speed

communication.name: Communication
communication.note: Transmit messages over distance. Range: rank-based distance

comprehend.name: Comprehend
comprehend.note: Understand languages/concepts. 1 rank = understand, 2 ranks = speak, etc.

concealment.name: Concealment
concealment.note: Hide from senses. 1 rank per sense type (partial), 2 ranks per sense type (full). Visual = 4 ranks total

create.name: Create
create.note: Create solid objects. Volume rank = effect rank. Toughness = effect rank

damage.name: Damage
damage.note: Base close damage. Add Increased Range extra for ranged (= sample Blast at 2/rank)

deflect.name: Deflect
deflect.note: Deflect incoming attacks. Check: d20 + effect rank vs attack roll

elongation.name: Elongation
elongation.note: Extend body parts. Each rank doubles reach distance

enhanced_trait.name: Enhanced Trait
enhanced_trait.note: Improve existing traits. Cost = cost of the enhanced trait (2/rank for abilities, 1/rank for defenses/advantages, 1/2 ranks for skills)

environment.name: Environment
environment.note: Modify surroundings (heat, cold, light, visibility, etc.). 1/rank per environment type, 2/rank for Impede Movement or Hamper

extra_limbs.name: Extra Limbs
extra_limbs.note: Gain additional limbs. Each rank = 1 extra limb

feature.name: Feature
feature.note: Minor ability not covered by other effects (1 point each)

flight.name: Flight
flight.note: Fly at rank speed (rank 1 = 2 mph, rank 2 = 4 mph, doubles each rank)

growth.name: Growth
growth.note: Increase size. Each rank: +1 Str, +1 Sta, +1 mass rank. Each 2 ranks: +1 Intimidation, -1 Dodge, -1 Parry. Each 4 ranks: +1 size category. Each 8 ranks: +1 Speed.

healing.name: Healing
healing.note: Heal damage conditions. DC 10 + rank to remove damage conditions

illusion.name: Illusion
illusion.note: Create false sensory impressions. Cost depends on senses affected: 1/rank per sense type, up to 5/rank for all senses

immortality.name: Immortality
immortality.note: Return from death. Recovery time based on rank

immunity.name: Immunity

5: specific damage descriptor (cold, fire, electricity, etc.)

immunity.note: Total immunity to specified effects. Rank cost depends on commonality.

insubstantial.name: Insubstantial
insubstantial.note: Become intangible. Rank 1: fluid, Rank 2: gaseous, Rank 3: energy, Rank 4: incorporeal

leaping.name: Leaping
leaping.note: Enhanced jumping. Each rank doubles distance

luck_control.name: Luck Control
luck_control.note: Manipulate probability. Spend VP to use: force reroll, grant VP, negate VP use, etc.

mind_reading.name: Mind Reading
mind_reading.note: Read surface thoughts. Opposed by Will. Additional degrees reveal deeper thoughts.

morph.name: Morph
morph.note: Change appearance. Rank determines breadth: 1 = single form, 2 = group, 3 = broad group, 4 = any humanoid, 5 = anything

move_object.name: Move Object
move_object.note: Telekinesis. Effective Strength = rank for lifting/moving. Can use as ranged attack for grab/throw.

movement.name: Movement
movement.note: Special movement modes: 1 rank each for Environmental Adaptation, Safe Fall, Slithering, Sure-footed, Swinging, Trackless, Wall-crawling, Water Walking, etc.

nullify.name: Nullify
nullify.note: Counter/suppress powers. Opposed check: d20 + Nullify rank vs d20 + target effect rank (or Will)

protection.name: Protection
protection.note: +1 Toughness per rank (passive, not lost when vulnerable)

quickness.name: Quickness
quickness.note: Perform routine tasks faster. Each rank halves time required

regeneration.name: Regeneration
regeneration.note: Recover from damage automatically. Rank determines recovery rate

remote_sensing.name: Remote Sensing
remote_sensing.note: Perceive from a distance. Cost: 1/rank per sense type. Range: rank-based distance

senses.name: Senses
senses.note: Gain new senses. 1 rank each for: Accurate, Acute, Analytical, Awareness, Counters Concealment, Counters Illusion, Danger Sense, Darkvision, Direction Sense, Distance Sense, Extended, Infravision, Low-light Vision, Microscopic Vision, Penetrates Concealment, Postcognition, Precognition, Radio, Radius, Ranged, Rapid, Time Sense, Tracking, Ultra-hearing, Ultravision

shrinking.name: Shrinking
shrinking.note: Decrease size. Per rank: +1 Stealth. Per 2 ranks: -1 Intimidation, +1 Dodge, +1 Parry. Per 4 ranks: -1 Str, -1 size category. Per 8 ranks: -1 Speed.

speed.name: Speed
speed.note: Increase ground speed. Rank 1 = 4 mph, doubles each rank

summon.name: Summon
summon.note: Summon a creature/entity. Summoned being has 15 x rank character points

teleport.name: Teleport
teleport.note: Instant movement. Distance based on rank

transform.name: Transform
transform.note: Change target into something else. Cost: 2/rank (one thing to one other), 3/rank (one to similar), 4/rank (one to any), 5/rank (anything to anything)

variable.name: Variable
variable.note: Flexible power pool. Each rank = 5 effect points that can be reassigned

weaken.name: Weaken
weaken.note: Reduce target trait. Degrees of failure determine ranks lost. Target chooses which trait is affected unless specified.
